summary: Completed testing of SoulNutri Moderation Queue feature. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin panel verified - Moderação tab working with filter, action buttons (Aprovar/Rejeitar/Corrigir), and status badges. App feedback buttons correctly simplified to 3 options.

integration_issues.issue: Console errors for missing admin endpoints (api-usage, premium-users, settings) - non-critical, pre-existing

issues: Moderation images show red/green placeholder when S3 images fail to load - fallback working but images not displaying

critical_code_review_comments: Moderation queue endpoints correctly implemented with MongoDB storage
Frontend Admin.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
App.js feedback buttons correctly simplified to 3 options: 'Sim, está correto', 'Não, tentar novamente', 'Voltar'
No text input field for dish name in feedback (correct per requirements)
No dish list modal for correction (correct per requirements)
seed_data_creation: Test items created during pytest execution using /tmp/test_mod.jpg
context_for_next_testing_agent: Moderation feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/feedback/moderation-queue, GET /api/admin/moderation-queue?status={pending|approved|rejected|corrected|all}, POST /api/admin/moderation/{id}/approve, POST /api/admin/moderation/{id}/reject, POST /api/admin/moderation/{id}/correct, GET /api/admin/moderation-image/{id}. Frontend: Admin.js has Moderação tab with data-testid='tab-moderation', filter with data-testid='moderation-filter', items with data-testid='moderation-item-{id}', action buttons with data-testid='moderation-{approve|reject|correct}-{id}'. App.js feedback section has data-testid='feedback-section' with 3 buttons: feedback-correct-btn, feedback-incorrect-btn, feedback-back-btn.

passed_tests: test_create_moderation_item - POST /api/feedback/moderation-queue creates item with queue_id
test_get_moderation_queue_approved - Filter by approved status works
test_get_moderation_queue_rejected - Filter by rejected status works
test_get_moderation_queue_corrected - Filter by corrected status works
test_moderation_item_structure - Items have correct fields (id, original_dish_display, status, created_at)
test_approve_moderation_item - POST /api/admin/moderation/{id}/approve changes status to approved
test_reject_moderation_item - POST /api/admin/moderation/{id}/reject changes status to rejected
test_correct_without_name_fails - Correction without dish name correctly fails
test_action_on_invalid_id - Actions on invalid ID correctly handled
test_existing_pending_items - Verified pending items in queue
test_existing_resolved_items - Verified resolved items (approved, rejected, corrected)

frontend_verification.admin_moderation_tab: Visible with badge showing pending count (13)
frontend_verification.moderation_filter: Dropdown with options: Pendentes, Aprovados, Rejeitados, Corrigidos, Todos - all working
frontend_verification.moderation_items: 13 items displayed with correct status badges (Pendente/Aprovado/Rejeitado/Corrigido)
frontend_verification.action_buttons: Aprovar, Rejeitar, Corrigir buttons present for pending items
frontend_verification.correction_input: Input field appears when clicking Corrigir button
frontend_verification.no_text_input: Confirmed no text input for dish name in feedback section
frontend_verification.no_dish_list_modal: Confirmed no dish list modal for correction

moderation_queue.list_items: GET /api/admin/moderation-queue - Working with all filter options
